    • elementChanged

      public void elementChanged(ElementChangedEvent event)
      Description copied from interface: IElementChangedListener
      Notifies that one or more Rodin elements have changed. The specific details of the change are described by the given event.
      Specified by:
      elementChanged in interface IElementChangedListener
      Parameters:
      event - the change event
